FAQ.title: You’ve Got Questions, We’ve Got Connections.
FAQ.description: Everything you need to know about HiNet eSIMs, setup, and global coverage.

q1.question: What exactly is an eSIM, and how does it work?
q1.answer: An eSIM is a digital version of the physical SIM card you already use. It’s embedded in your phone, allowing you to download a data plan instantly without swapping plastic cards. Just scan, activate, and you’re online.

q2.question: What is the HiNet App?
q2.answer: The HiNet App is your gateway to global connectivity. It allows you to purchase, manage, and activate eSIMs for over 190 countries, track your data usage in real-time, and top up your plan whenever you need more data.

q3.question: How do I install an eSIM?
q3.answer: Installing an eSIM is easy. After purchasing a plan, you'll receive a QR code. Simply go to your phone's cellular settings, select 'Add eSIM', and scan the QR code. Follow the on-screen instructions, and you'll be set up in minutes.

q4.question: Which devices support eSIM?
q4.answer: Most modern smartphones, including iPhone 11 and later, Samsung Galaxy S20 and later, and Google Pixel 3 and later, support eSIM technology.
